parameters: チャットエンドしたらignore復活する
対象キャラ名 = ダリオ
skit pose マナ t child 5
skit fadeIn マナ t right 60
完了までウェイト = true

\SE[5]Whoa! Th-that's amazing! There are so many people here!! Wow! Ah, a baby! A human
baby! I've never seen one before!
Hey! Where are you going! What if you get separated! Mana-chan!

...! Mister merchant, this! Is this the sword they say the hero used!? Huh!? Y-you
can buy that for this price!?

That thing is obviously a rip-off...! \n[1]-kun, don't go off on your own either!
C'mon, we're going together!

...We were immediately captivated by the bustle of the town we were visiting for the
first time. Dazzled by the vibrant sight of the lively people... I had completely
forgotten about the quarrel with my sister this morning........
